name: Activity
description: Read-only activity feed: a page and endpoint that fold the universal record-change ledger every collection write already appends to into "actor ACTION collection title" rows for the signed-in user's own activity. Owns no collection and no schema -- it only reads object_record_changes logs. Deferred: a broader activity-on-anything-I-can-see feed that filters other users' changes per record against the viewer's read access (see plan/vocabulary/23-activity-spec.md).
